features.name: resetall directive between timescale and localparam time literal
features.description: Code should include a `resetall directive placed between a `timescale directive and a localparam definition using a time literal (e.g., 100s), where the localparam's value depends on the timescale

features.name: resetall directive with default_nettype interaction
features.description: Code should include a `resetall directive placed between a `default_nettype directive and other code, to test that resetall properly resets the nettype

features.name: resetall directive with celldefine interaction
features.description: Code should include a `resetall directive placed between a `celldefine directive and other code, to test that resetall properly resets the cell definition state

features.name: localparam time literal with explicit timescale before resetall
features.description: Code should include a localparam with a time literal (100s) that is defined after a `timescale directive but before a `resetall, where the value depends on the timescale
